case_title: PERSOLVE, LLC, ALIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. BARBARA A MCBRIDE et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-21-2008 CONTINUED TO JUN-20-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
